title: Keep the main story horizontal
summary: The core path should be complete on its own. Detours add confidence without becoming required reading.

signals.title: Complete path
signals.body: Each core slide advances the narrative even when vertical slides are skipped.

signals.title: Current reference
signals.body: Authoring uses the selected slide as the anchor for add and remove actions.

signals.title: Detour cue
signals.body: Presentation mode can show that optional detail exists below this slide.

signals.title: Export safe
signals.body: Static outputs can stay concise because the core path carries the full story.

guardrails.title: Required context
guardrails.body: Put required definitions and transitions on the core path.

guardrails.title: Optional proof
guardrails.body: Move supporting proof, examples, and implementation notes into detours.

guardrails.title: Return point
guardrails.body: Make every detour clearly return to its parent slide.
